item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-4094 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-4094 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
The FOX – Currency Switcher Professional for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized data loss due to a missing capability check on the 'admin_head' function in all versions up to, and including, 1.4.5. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to delete the entire multi-currency configuration by visiting any wp-admin page with the `woocs_reset...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4094

item.title: [Infraestrutura] NGINX Rift Exploit (CVE-2026-42945): The AI Vulnerability Supply Shock Breaking Infrastructure Security - CTOL Digital Solutions
item.description:
🚨 NGINX Rift Exploit (CVE-2026-42945): The AI Vulnerability Supply Shock Breaking Infrastructure Security - CTOL Digital Solutions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-42945 associada a Nginx. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxNSHFvRnl0Z0FEckN2YUs5MUhITzNSTXVRc0FOSEhrb2U5c3dlVzJDZjNDdWo4eGsxMDZqTEx0RkhMR2hDUlRFZG9oYUkxV3hqaUFYREtTd0xfRllDdHpNcjdHMDJLaW1zangxbW0tOGZiel9qczhQMzgxOGQ0Y05wREltMWFPa0UyTjluUDVMdw?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-46356 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-46356 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Fleet is open source device management software. Prior to version 4.80.1, a vulnerability in Fleet's IP extraction logic allows unauthenticated attackers to bypass API rate limiting by spoofing client IP headers. This may allow brute-force login attempts or other abuse against Fleet instances exposed to the public internet. Fleet extracted client IP addresses from request headers (`True-Client-IP`, `X-Real-IP`, `X-Fo...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46356

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-24899 - Azure
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-24899 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Fleet is open source device management software. Prior to version 4.82.0, a vulnerability in Fleet's Windows MDM enrollment flow allows authentication tokens from any Azure AD tenant to be accepted. Because Fleet validates JWT signatures using Microsoft's multi-tenant JWKS endpoint but does not enforce the `aud` (audience) or `iss` (issuer) claims, any Microsoft-signed Azure AD access token containing the expected sc...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-24899

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-45009 - Elastic
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-45009 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.3
Resumo:
phpMyFAQ before 4.1.2 contains an insufficient authorization vulnerability in admin-api routes that allows authenticated ordinary users to access administrative endpoints by only checking login status instead of verifying backend privileges. Attackers with valid frontend user accounts can access sensitive backend operational information including dashboard versions, LDAP configuration, Elasticsearch statistics, and h...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45009

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-44544 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-44544 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
gittuf is a platform-agnostic Git security system. Prior to 0.14.0, an attacker with push access to gittuf's Reference State Log (RSL) can roll back the current policy to any previous policy trusted by the current set of root keys. gittuf determines the policy to load by inspecting the RSL. Except for the very first policy (which is automatically trusted given gittuf's TOFU model, or verified against manually specifi...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44544

item.title: [Segurança] Funnel Builder WordPress plugin bug exploited to steal credit cards
item.description:
💣 Funnel Builder WordPress plugin bug exploited to steal credit cards
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A critical vulnerability in the Funnel Builder plugin for WordPress is being actively exploited to inject malicious JavaScript snippets into WooCommerce checkout pages.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/funnel-builder-wordpress-plugin-bug-exploited-to-steal-credit-cards/

Fonte: CIS Advisories

item.title: [Segurança] Stealer Backdoor Found in 3 Node-IPC Versions Targeting Developer Secrets
item.description:
📰 Stealer Backdoor Found in 3 Node-IPC Versions Targeting Developer Secrets
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers are sounding the alarm about what has been described as "malicious activity" in newly published versions of node-ipc. According to Socket and StepSecurity, three different versions of the npm package have been confirmed as malicious - node-ipc@9.1.6 node-ipc@9.2.3 node-ipc@12.0.1 "Early analysis indicates that node-ipc@9.1.6, node-ipc@9.2.3, and node-ipc@12.0.1
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/stealer-backdoor-found-in-3-node-ipc.html

item.title: [Segurança] Popular node-ipc npm package compromised to steal credentials
item.description:
📰 Popular node-ipc npm package compromised to steal credentials
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers have injected credential-stealing malware into newly published versions of node-ipc, a popular inter-process communication package, in a new supply chain attack targeting npm.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/popular-node-ipc-npm-package-compromised-to-steal-credentials/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Finding the blind spot: How Canonical hunts logic flaws with AI
item.description:
📰 Finding the blind spot: How Canonical hunts logic flaws with AI
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
AI is accelerating and improving how security engineers find and fix vulnerabilities. A new tool developed and used at Canonical, called Redhound, has already uncovered three critical logic vunerabilites, paving the way for a more secure software landscape.
Link: https://ubuntu.com//blog/finding-the-blind-spot-how-canonical-hunts-logic-flaws-with-ai
